description: UEFN Toolbelt Plugin Registry — core tools and community plugins.

plugins.name: Material Master
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: 17 material presets (chrome, neon, hologram, lava, ice, and more). Gradient painter, team color split, pattern painter, glow pulse preview, color harmony, and bulk swap.

plugins.name: Arena Generator
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Procedural symmetrical arena builder with team color auto-split. Generates small/medium/large competitive layouts in one command.

plugins.name: Prop Patterns
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: 8 procedural placement patterns: grid, circle, arc, spiral, line, wave, helix, and radial rows. Place any asset in any geometric arrangement with one command.

plugins.name: Spline Prop Placer
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Place props along any selected spline with configurable count and tangent alignment. Includes scatter along path and Poisson-disk HISM scatter for high-count placement.

plugins.name: Bulk Operations
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: 8 bulk transform tools: align, distribute, randomize, snap to grid, reset, mirror, normalize, and stack. All wrapped in editor transactions for full undo safety.

plugins.name: Verse Device Editor
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Bulk-set UPROPERTY values on Verse/Creative devices, select devices by name or class, and export a full JSON report of all device properties in the level.

plugins.name: Verse Snippet Generator
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Generates Verse boilerplate from your live level: game manager skeleton, device declarations, elimination handlers, scoring trackers, prop spawners, and patrol AI from splines.

plugins.name: Verse Device Graph
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Force-directed node graph visualization of all Verse/Creative device connections. Cluster detection, architecture health score, and full JSON export. Inspired by ImmatureGamer.

plugins.name: Verse Schema
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Scans and documents all Verse device properties exposed to the editor. Syncs the AI's schema context so Claude Code has perfect knowledge of your project's unique devices.

plugins.name: Spline to Verse
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Converts selected splines into Verse vector3 arrays, patrol AI skeletons, zone boundary helpers, and JSON exports. Bridges editor geometry directly into Verse code.

plugins.name: Smart Importer
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Single FBX and batch folder import with automatic naming convention enforcement and destination management.

plugins.name: Asset Importer
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Extended asset import pipeline with type detection, destination routing, and post-import validation.

plugins.name: Asset Renamer
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Enforce Epic naming conventions (SM_, T_, M_, MI_, SK_, BP_, A_, P_) across your entire project. Dry-run preview, strip prefix, and full audit JSON export.

plugins.name: Asset Tagger
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Tag Content Browser assets with TB: namespace key/value pairs. Search, filter, list, and export tags. Collision-safe tagging that survives project updates.

plugins.name: Smart Organizer
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Automatically sorts loose assets in /Game into typed subfolders (Meshes, Textures, Materials, Blueprints, Audio, Particles). Dry-run safe.

plugins.name: Reference Auditor
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Full project health audit: orphaned assets, stale redirectors, duplicate names, unused textures. Dry-run safe — preview before delete.

plugins.name: Text Painter
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Place 3D text actors, label selections with their names, paint A1–D4 coordinate grids, color-cycle team labels, and save/apply named text styles.

plugins.name: Text Voxelizer
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Converts text strings into 3D voxel grids of actors. Configurable voxel size, spacing, and asset. Great for large environmental signage and title screens.

plugins.name: Foliage Tools
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Convert selected meshes to foliage actors and audit all foliage type brushes in the level.

plugins.name: Foliage Converter
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Batch convert static mesh actors to HISM (Hierarchical Instanced Static Mesh) components for dramatic draw call reduction on high-count prop scenes.

plugins.name: Entity Kits
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Spawn pre-made device clusters (quick-spawn kits) with one command. List available kits and deploy entire device setups instantly.

plugins.name: LOD Tools
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Auto-generate LODs for selected actors or entire folders, batch-set collision complexity, and audit folders for missing LODs and collision setups.

plugins.name: Memory Profiler
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Scans textures and meshes for budget violations. Ranks top offenders by memory cost, flags oversized textures and high-poly meshes, auto-generates missing LODs.

plugins.name: System Performance
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Editor performance diagnostics: frame budget analysis, draw call reporter, shader complexity scan, and actor count breakdowns by class.

plugins.name: Procedural Geometry
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Programmatic geometry generation: stairs, ramps, walls, and modular building blocks. Parameterized by dimensions with automatic grid snapping.

plugins.name: Level Snapshot
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Save, restore, diff, and compare actor transforms as named JSON snapshots. Full undo safety for destructive layout experiments.

plugins.name: Selection Utilities
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Smart selection tools: select by class, material, tag, proximity radius, or bounding box overlap. Invert, grow, and filter selections programmatically.

plugins.name: Measurement Tools
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: 3D distance measurement between selected actors, travel time estimation at Walk/Run/Sprint speeds, and precise spline world-length calculation.

plugins.name: Screenshot Tools
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Viewport capture at any resolution, auto-frame selection and shoot, timed burst series, and output folder management. All output goes to Saved/UEFN_Toolbelt/screenshots/.

plugins.name: Project Scaffold
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Generate full Content Browser folder structures from templates (uefn_standard, competitive_map, solo_dev, verse_heavy). Preview before committing. Save custom templates.

plugins.name: Project Admin
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Project health report, folder audits, and cleanup workflows. Identifies oversized folders, missing redirectors, and project-wide naming violations.

plugins.name: System Build
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Build system utilities: validate project structure, check for missing dependencies, and generate pre-publish checklists before submitting to the island library.

plugins.name: Localization Tools
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Harvest all text from level actors into a CSV/JSON manifest for translation, then apply translated files back to update actor labels automatically.

plugins.name: Lighting Mastery
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Batch lightmap resolution setter, light channel manager, and stationary light audit. Identifies lighting budget violations and optimizes shadow-casting actors.

plugins.name: Sequencer Tools
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Level sequence helpers, track export, and timing utilities for cinematic and event-driven UEFN sequences.

plugins.name: Sim Device Proxy
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Read Verse simulation device state without entering Play-In-Editor. Inspect device property snapshots and compare state changes across sessions.

plugins.name: Config Tools
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Dashboard-accessible config get/set/list/reset. Manage all Toolbelt settings including active theme, MCP port, default scan paths, and verse project path.

plugins.name: API Capability Crawler
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Deep-crawls the unreal Python module to discover and document API surface changes between UEFN versions. Outputs structured diffs for AI context updates.

plugins.name: Plugin Manager
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Validate all registered tools against schema, list loaded custom plugins, and export the full tool_manifest.json with complete parameter signatures for AI agent use.

plugins.name: API Explorer
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Live fuzzy search, full signature inspection, and .pyi stub generation for the UEFN Python API. Exports unreal.pyi for IDE autocomplete.

plugins.name: MCP Bridge
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: HTTP listener inside UEFN that lets Claude Code and external scripts control the editor in real time. Adapted from the UEFN MCP Server concept by Kirch (@KirchCreator).

plugins.name: Random Yaw
plugins.author: Ocean Bennett
plugins.description: Randomizes only the yaw (Z rotation) of selected actors. Preserves pitch and roll — ideal for natural prop variation without a cluttered look.
